THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: PLAINTIFF CELINE CURRAN SHALL HAVE JUDGMENT ENTERED IN HER FAVOR AND AGAINST SCHOOLS OF THE SACRED HEART - SAN FRANCISCO ON HER THIRD AND FOURTH CAUSES OF ACTION IN HER AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR FAILURE TO PAY VESTED VACATION PAY AND WAITING TIME PENALTIES IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE SPECIAL VERDICT. DEFENDANT SCHOOLS OF THE SACRED HEART SHALL HAVE JUDGMENT OF DISMISSAL ENTERED IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF CELINE CURRAN ON PLAINTIFFS FIRST AND SECOND CAUSES OF ACTION IN HER AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR AGE DISCRIMINATION AND WRONGFUL TERMINATION AND REFUSAL TO HIRE IN VIOLATION OF PUBLIC POLICY, AND HER FIRST AND THIRD CAUSES OF ACTION IN HER ORIGINAL COMPLAINT FOR GENDER DISCRIMINATION AND RETALIATION. PLAINTIFF CELINE CURRAN SHALL BE AWARDED ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COST IN AN AMOUNT TO BE DETERMINED BY THE COURT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
